message:
refactor(update): Consolidate update check disable logic

Extract updates_disabled() helper function to centralize the logic for
skipping update checks. Now respects multiple environment variables:

- CASS_SKIP_UPDATE: Explicit opt-out
- CODING_AGENT_SEARCH_NO_UPDATE_PROMPT: Legacy opt-out
- TUI_HEADLESS: Headless/automated TUI mode
- CI: Continuous integration environments

This ensures consistent behavior across all update check callers and
prevents unwanted update prompts in automated/headless scenarios.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
